description_long: This bungalow features two parallel, rectangular buildings with flat, red-brown roofs and large, continuous glass windows along the front facades. The structures are separated by a central open courtyard, which includes a circular decorative element, possibly a fountain or planter, set in a paved area. The buildings are set on a green lawn with paved walkways leading up to the entrances, and the overall layout is symmetrical. The exterior walls are primarily white and gray, with the roofs providing a contrasting color. The design is modern, with clean lines and an emphasis on horizontal elements. The large windows suggest an open, airy interior with ample natural light.
description: A modern, symmetrical bungalow with two flat-roofed wings, large front glass windows, and a central courtyard with a circular feature. The exterior is white and gray with red-brown roofs and green lawns.
description_view_0: Front view showing both wings, large glass windows, the central courtyard, and the circular feature in the middle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the red-brown roofs and the green lawn, with minimal window visibility.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with large windows and the central courtyard visible, but less detail on the circular feature.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the length of the roofs and the lawn, with little window detail.
